data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures user data is encrypted both in transit and at rest to prevent unauthorized access.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: MFA is required for administrative access to sensitive data or systems.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Implements proactive threat detection to identify and neutralize security threats.

data.title: Advanced Firewalls
data.description: Deploys advanced firewall systems to protect against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Web application firewall, intrusion detection systems

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Periodically conducts security audits to ensure compliance and identify vulnerabilities.
